result.stdout:
USAGE: ls [--help] [--interval <int>] [--directory <string>] [--push <bool>]

OPTIONS:

    --interval <int>      Commit interval in minutes
    --directory <string>  Path to Git repository directory
    --push <bool>         Pushes changes to remote with each commit
    --help                display this list of options.
